textEn: By the sky containing great stars
And [by] the promised Day
And [by] the witness and what is witnessed,
Destroyed [i.e., cursed] were the companions of the trench
[Containing] the fire full of fuel,
When they were sitting near it.

textAr: وَهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَفْعَلُونَ بِٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ شُهُودٌ
textEn: And they, to what they were doing against the believers, were witnesses. 1
textTranslit: Wa hum 'alaa maa yaf'aloona bilmu 'mineena shuhood

textAr: وَمَا نَقَمُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ
textEn: And they resented them not except because they believed in Allāh, the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy,
textTranslit: Wa maa naqamoo minhum illaaa aiyu'minoo billaahil 'azeezil Hameed

textAr: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدٌ
textEn: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allāh, over all things, is Witness.
textTranslit: Allazee lahoo mulkus samaawaati wal ard; wallaahu 'alaa kulli shai 'in Shaheed

textAr: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُوا۟ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَتُوبُوا۟ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ ٱلْحَرِيقِ
textEn: Indeed, those who have tortured the believing men and believing women and then have not repented will have the punishment of Hell, and they will have the punishment of the Burning Fire.
textTranslit: Innal lazeena fatanul mu'mineena wal mu'minaati summa lam yatooboo falahum 'azaabu Jahannama wa lahum 'azaabul hareeq

textAr: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّـٰتٌ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
textEn: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment.
textTranslit: Innal lazeena aamanoo wa 'amilus saalihaati lahum Jannaatun tajree min tahtihal anhaar; zaalikal fawzul kabeer

textEn: Indeed, the assault [i.e., vengeance] of your Lord is severe.
Indeed, it is He who originates [creation] and repeats.
And He is the Forgiving, the Affectionate,
Honorable Owner of the Throne,
Effecter of what He intends.
Has there reached you the story of the soldiers -
[Those of] Pharaoh and Thamūd?
But they who disbelieve are in [persistent] denial,
While Allāh encompasses them from behind.
But this is an honored Qur’ān
[Inscribed] in a Preserved Slate.
